evidence.quote: Model-Based Clustering
Clustering methods address the challenge of collecting observations into a number of homogeneous groups based on quantitative measurements on the observations.
The aim of this article is to provide a review of the theory underpinning model-based clustering, to outline associated inferential approaches, and to highlight recent methodological developments
allows for robust approaches to parameter estimation and objective inference on the number of clusters
